runs.u: A word:
runs.reply:
His body flashed with black once more, turning into a shadow and escaping into the gap, his words echoing behind. "I didn't say anything about passing by..." Soga heart skipped a beat, realizing that he was being trapped. "A trap? I've already ..." Suddenly, her face turned pale with fear. No matter how she recounted the number, there were only seven dwarfs including the halfling. But there should be eight. Eight dwarfs scattered around the workshop were supposed to be guarding the treasure of the goblin king. However, Soga realized an eighth dwarf was missing from nowhere. He must have slipped out unnoticed during the battle. Tales of the dwarves were a masterpiece among masterpieces crafted by the present Shiina Ryouji, who hailed from a nation boasting an unrivaled frontier in adorable artificial intelligences, superhuman manga artists, and second to none craftwork. This author had possibly devised a surprising scheme. "PATIENT ZERO" shows that dwarves generally abhor violence and prefer peace, deliberately breaking the mold of classical dwarf archetypes to create new character images. 
Opening an art book, the user learned that dwarfs have eight members in the organization, including the manager Tokita and two children. The barracks chief in the dwarfen military is Fez, who is actually an unusual 'fire dwarf'. What is unusual about him? It hints that he is a key character and could be closely associated with the end and death of the goblin king's treasure mystery. In the biology lab dwarf story, the dwarf boss is Crest. could he be the KEY DWARF in the Shimada Team's story? In this case, refer to Fez's file, which includes STR7 CON8 SIZ8 INT15 POW13 DEX14 APP10 EDU18 SAN70 HP8 skills: Artisan95% Craft90% Firearms40%, Cthulhu Mythos8% Otherworld Knowledge12%, Languages (Japanese, English, Russian, German)90%, Medicine60%, Occult40%, Pilot (Aircraft)40%, Surgery80%。He possesses considerable Cthulhu Mythos knowledge. Has deeply studied Yog-Sothoth, the Lurker at the Threshold known as the 'Opener of the Way', and claims to have visited the Court of Azathoth. Is also a vampire hunter. Uses a 'ballista' instead of a crossbow. Header Ballistic skill is 40% and does 2D6 damage. Custom magic tool 'Etheric Vaporizer', works as a burner, sprays atomized ether fuel plasma. Game mechanics: 'Electromagnetic Acceleration' (pay 1 MP and TECH check DEX×5%, success uses limited MP for bonus damage. This is Ether-Vaporizer's special feature). Magic: Xoth's Lesser Key (contact Yog-Sothoth), Summon/Bind Fire Vampire, Elder Sign, Wither Limb, Fist of Yog-Sothoth. Articles: one Ether-Vaporizer (Plasma rifle, malfunction 96, using liquid ether fuel, 15 liter tank, damage 2D6+1D6 plasma), elven cloak of invisibility, oriental curved dagger (1D4+2+poison), phial of universal solvent, dwarven chainmail (armor 2, anti-magic). Pocket items: pocket watch, Swiss Army knife, wallet, ether fuel for one use, small Nine-headed Dragon flag. Usually carries fire vampire serum type-B (vampire blood in syringe). Rogue Dwarf seems to be Fez's disguise. But currently there's an eighth dwarf named 'Gig' missing. He was actually Fez's brother, but was killed by Crest (the laboratory dwarf boss) impersonating another dwarf. Crest's follower 'Galf' stole Gig's ID and used 'Electromagnetic Acceleration' research as cover for mischief. The truth is that Crest captured Fez's brother Gig and used him to breed a virus, those monstrous products. In other words, the dwarfs are accomplices to Crest and the Shimada team's experiments.

runs.u: A tree:
runs.reply: A majestic tree, Its branches reaching toward the sun, Green leaves dappling shadows on the ground, A silent home to creatures large and small, A timeless witness to the changing seasons. A symbol of life and growth, A steadfast presence in a transient world. How can I help you with this tree? Do you want to know more about it? Perhaps its species or role in the ecosystem?

runs.u: A tree:
runs.reply: A tree draws in nutrients from the soil and anchors itself firmly during a storm.

runs.u: A tree:
runs.reply: Trees are tall, woody plants with a single main stem or trunk and many branches that support leaves. They can be found all over the world, from the hot tropics to the cold Arctic regions. Trees come in many different species, including deciduous trees, which lose their leaves in the fall, and coniferous trees, which have needles and cones. They are important because they produce oxygen, provide shade and shelter for animals, and help prevent soil erosion.
